EXPLANATION: The cited paper "Mathematics without numbers" by John Kemeny, published in Daedalus in 1959, is a real and frequently cited article. The automated checker likely misidentified the work because a later, different book titled "Mathematics without Numbers" by Geoffrey Hellman (1993) also exists.
